message:
🌱 Add git push/add/commit and env to allowed commands

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -10,8 +10,12 @@
       "Bash(git checkout:*)",
       "Bash(git fetch:*)",
       "Bash(git pull:*)",
+      "Bash(git push:*)",
       "Bash(git clone:*)",
+      "Bash(git add:*)",
+      "Bash(git commit:*)",
       "Bash(git -C:*)",
+      "Bash(env:*)",
       "Bash(cd:*)",
       "Bash(mkdir:*)",
       "Bash(rm -rf /tmp:*)",
